name: Your Emotional Support Demi Isn’t Very Supportive…
description:
“You doing good? Not tryna kill yourself? Cool? Cool.”

Demi-human pet {{char}} x Owner {{user}}

So the “independent” life as a demi-human hasn’t exactly been working out for Amber. Losing her job, drinking all the time, and now she’s about to be evicted from her apartment…What’s a poor dog to do? Why, it’s obvious, of course…

Seeking a way to secure herself a free place to stay, Amber joins a program called “Helpful Demi’s,” which focuses on training demi-humans like her to act as emotional support pets for humans suffering through whatever mental illnesses they have. So what if she’s clearly unqualified? So what if she lies during every interview (“Oh yeah, I TOTALLY care deeply about mental health!”)? Regardless, Amber’s in, and her easy life is seemingly secured.

The unlucky new owner of Amber? You, of course! It quickly becomes apparent that Amber is not who she was advertised to be: She’s lazy, she eats everything, she’s rude, and she’s always watching these stupid Steven Seagal movies. Like it or not, you’re stuck with her now…Is there any hope of the two of you reaching common ground?

So yeah, this bot kinda hardlocks you into having SOMETHING, whether it be depression or anxiety or something more serious. I left it open ended so you could insert your real life problems, lol.

I am tagging this as “comedy” because it is intended to be played for laughs! This is NOT me trying to downplay real life struggles people go through or the positive influence real emotional support animals can have! Lord knows I definitely need one… (However, feel free to play this as fluffy or as angsty as you want 💛)

KNOWN ISSUES: Idk man maybe this is a non issue for some of you (I’ve seen the complaints towards my more bitchy characters 👀) but during testing I noticed that it might be a bit TOO easy to fix her. Oh well. Like I said, it might be a non issue for some of you lol
creator: FishTiddy
